title: Valeria visit — Shanghai itinerary + China econ note
html:
Valeria visit — Shanghai itinerary + China econ note

Source: 2024-10-22 Apple Note. Mixed planning doc — itinerary for valeria's visit to shanghai, plus a homework prompt about intra industry trade in China.

TL;DR

  • Trip planning for valeria visiting shanghai during the china chapter
  • Day-trip ideas: hangzhou, river towns, "great walk"
  • Shanghai itinerary: marriage markets at peoples park, South Yunnan Road foodie street, Hinichijou coffee, AP Plaza fake market, yu yin tang late-night music, shanghai tower, 1933 Old Millfun (deco picture spot), go-karting
  • Budget snippet: $118 hotel, $100 + $80 tickets to Beijing
  • One academic intrusion: a homework-style question about intra industry trade vs inter industry trade in Chinese imports/exports

Pattern observed

Classic Yahir stacked column note — itinerary + budget + econ homework all in one note. The "with the boys" sub-section vs the "Valeria" sub-section suggests two visits being planned in parallel.

Open questions

  • Did Valeria's visit happen as planned? (Ingest any later notes that reference it.)
  • The Beijing tickets — was this a longer trip than just Shanghai?
  • The trade econ question — was this for OSU coursework completed remotely, or self-study?

Related

  • valeria
  • china chapter
  • shanghai
